title: cirsium × bipontinum
intro: Cirsium × bipontinum, also known as Bipont's thistle, is a hybrid thistle plant that is a cross between Cirsium dissectum and Cirsium vulgare. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bipont's thistle include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or in infusions, and its flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, salves, and creams.
